requested_items.objective: Run a broader rough decoder distribution robustness map across prompt categories, entropy/margin regimes, and integer versus fp-like probability formats.

expected_result.reason: The map should show whether the q/fp approximation cliffs persist across broader prompt/logit entropy and top-1 margin regimes before any narrow approximation parameter tuning.
